hibernate-mapping.sql-query: select source_system_cd, source_company_id from ( select first_value(ae.achenrollment_seq) over (partition by ae.company_agency_fk order by ae.status_effective_date desc) topenrollment, ae.achenrollment_seq aeseq, ae.status, cs.status_cd, tci.last_quarter_to_file, cl.filing_status, ca.company_fk, comp.source_system_cd, comp.source_company_id from psp_achenrollment ae join psp_company_agency ca on ca.company_agency_seq = ae.company_agency_fk join psp_company_law cl on cl.company_agency_fk = ca.company_agency_seq join psp_company_service cs on cs.company_fk = ca.company_fk and cs.service_fk = 'Tax' join psp_tax_company_service_info tci on tci.tax_company_service_info_seq = cs.company_service_seq join psp_company comp on comp.company_seq = ca.company_fk where ae.status <> 'Cancelled' and cl.law_fk = '92' and (CASE WHEN (:excludeDeletedCompany = 1) THEN comp.IS_DG_DISASSOCIATED ELSE 0 END) = 0 ) rec where topenrollment = aeseq and status = 'Enrolled' and not exists (select 'T' from psp_money_movement_transaction mmt where mmt.company_fk = rec.company_fk and mmt.tax_payment_status in ('ReadyToSend', 'OnHold', 'ATFFinalized') and mmt.payment_template_fk = 'FL-UCT6-PAYMENT') and ( (status_cd in ('Cancelled', 'Terminated') and (last_quarter_to_file = -1 or (last_quarter_to_file > 1 and last_quarter_to_file < to_char(fn_get_psp_timestamp, 'YYYYQ')))) or (status_cd not in ('Cancelled', 'Terminated') and filing_status = 'Inactive' ) )

select source_system_cd, source_company_id from ( select first_value(ae.achenrollment_seq) over (partition by ae.company_agency_fk order by ae.status_effective_date desc) topenrollment, ae.achenrollment_seq aeseq, ae.status, cs.status_cd, tci.last_quarter_to_file, cl.filing_status, ca.company_fk, comp.source_system_cd, comp.source_company_id from psp_achenrollment ae join psp_company_agency ca on ca.company_agency_seq = ae.company_agency_fk join psp_company_law cl on cl.company_agency_fk = ca.company_agency_seq join psp_company_service cs on cs.company_fk = ca.company_fk and cs.service_fk = 'Tax' join psp_tax_company_service_info tci on tci.tax_company_service_info_seq = cs.company_service_seq join psp_company comp on comp.company_seq = ca.company_fk where ae.status <> 'Cancelled' and cl.law_fk = '92' and (CASE WHEN (:excludeDeletedCompany = TRUE) THEN comp.IS_DG_DISASSOCIATED ELSE 0 END) = 0 ) rec where topenrollment = aeseq and status = 'Enrolled' and not exists (select 'T' from psp_money_movement_transaction mmt where mmt.company_fk = rec.company_fk and mmt.tax_payment_status in ('ReadyToSend', 'OnHold', 'ATFFinalized') and mmt.payment_template_fk = 'FL-UCT6-PAYMENT') and ( (status_cd in ('Cancelled', 'Terminated') and (last_quarter_to_file = -1 or (last_quarter_to_file > 1 and cast(last_quarter_to_file as varchar) < to_char(fn_get_psp_timestamp(1), 'YYYYQ')))) or (status_cd not in ('Cancelled', 'Terminated') and filing_status = 'Inactive' ) )

select source_system_cd, source_company_id, reseq from ( select first_value(re.rafenrollment_seq) over (partition by re.company_agency_fk order by re.status_effective_date desc) topenrollment, re.rafenrollment_seq reseq, re.status, cs.status_cd, tci.last_quarter_to_file, ca.company_fk, comp.source_system_cd, comp.source_company_id from psp_rafenrollment re join psp_company_agency ca on ca.company_agency_seq = re.company_agency_fk join psp_company_service cs on cs.company_fk = ca.company_fk and cs.service_fk = 'Tax' join psp_tax_company_service_info tci on tci.tax_company_service_info_seq = cs.company_service_seq join psp_company comp on comp.company_seq = ca.company_fk where re.status <> 'Cancelled' and (CASE WHEN (:excludeDeletedCompany = 1) THEN comp.IS_DG_DISASSOCIATED ELSE 0 END) = 0 ) rec where topenrollment = reseq and status = 'Enrolled' and not exists (select 'T' from psp_money_movement_transaction mmt where mmt.company_fk = rec.company_fk and mmt.tax_payment_status in ('ReadyToSend', 'OnHold') and mmt.payment_template_fk in ('IRS-941-PAYMENT', 'IRS-940-PAYMENT')) and status_cd in ('Cancelled', 'Terminated') and (last_quarter_to_file = -1 or (last_quarter_to_file > 1 and last_quarter_to_file < to_char(fn_get_psp_timestamp, 'YYYYQ')))

select source_system_cd, source_company_id, reseq from ( select first_value(re.rafenrollment_seq) over (partition by re.company_agency_fk order by re.status_effective_date desc) topenrollment, re.rafenrollment_seq reseq, re.status, cs.status_cd, tci.last_quarter_to_file, ca.company_fk, comp.source_system_cd, comp.source_company_id from psp_rafenrollment re join psp_company_agency ca on ca.company_agency_seq = re.company_agency_fk join psp_company_service cs on cs.company_fk = ca.company_fk and cs.service_fk = 'Tax' join psp_tax_company_service_info tci on tci.tax_company_service_info_seq = cs.company_service_seq join psp_company comp on comp.company_seq = ca.company_fk where re.status <> 'Cancelled' and (CASE WHEN (:excludeDeletedCompany = TRUE) THEN comp.IS_DG_DISASSOCIATED ELSE 0 END) = 0 ) rec where topenrollment = reseq and status = 'Enrolled' and not exists (select 'T' from psp_money_movement_transaction mmt where mmt.company_fk = rec.company_fk and mmt.tax_payment_status in ('ReadyToSend', 'OnHold') and mmt.payment_template_fk in ('IRS-941-PAYMENT', 'IRS-940-PAYMENT')) and status_cd in ('Cancelled', 'Terminated') and (last_quarter_to_file = -1 or (last_quarter_to_file > 1 and cast(last_quarter_to_file as varchar) < to_char(fn_get_psp_timestamp(1), 'YYYYQ')))

select * from ( select /*+leading(pa)*/ PA.AUDIT_DATE, C.SOURCE_COMPANY_ID, C.FED_TAX_ID_ENC, C.LEGAL_NAME, CAPT.PAYMENT_TEMPLATE_FK, CA.AGENCY_FK, CAPT.AGENCY_TAXPAYER_ID_ENC, PA.OLD_PROPERTY_VALUE, PA.NEW_PROPERTY_VALUE, row_number() over ( partition by c.source_company_id, ca.agency_fk, capt.payment_template_fk ORDER BY PA.AUDIT_DATE DESC ) rn from psp_company c join psp_company_service cs on CS.COMPANY_FK=C.COMPANY_SEQ join psp_property_audit pa on C.COMPANY_SEQ=PA.COMPANY_FK -- to get the payment template and agency tax payer id join psp_company_agency ca on CA.COMPANY_FK=C.COMPANY_SEQ join psp_companyagency_pmttemplate capt on CAPT.COMPANY_AGENCY_FK=CA.COMPANY_AGENCY_SEQ join psp_company_law cl on CL.COMPANY_LAW_SEQ=PA.OBJECT_IDENTIFIER and CL.COMPANY_AGENCY_FK = ca.company_agency_seq where PA.CLASS_NAME='CompanyLaw' and PA.PROPERTY_NAME='FilingStatus' -- Company is Active and CS.SERVICE_FK='Tax' and CS.STATUS_CD='ActiveCurrent' and CL.ADDITIONAL_COMPANY_LAW_FK is null -- Data for the current month and PA.AUDIT_DATE >= :firstDayOfMonth and PA.AUDIT_DATE <= :lastDayOfMonth -- excluding NOCALC agency and federal (IRS) agency and CA.AGENCY_FK not in ('NOCALC', 'IRS','FLDOR') -- Condition for checking DGDeleted companies and (CASE WHEN (:excludeDeletedCompany = 1) THEN c.IS_DG_DISASSOCIATED ELSE 0 END) = 0 -- Condition to get payment templates that are inactive (all means companylaws are inactive for that payment template in CompanyLaw table) and ( PA.OLD_PROPERTY_VALUE='Inactive' or ( PA.OLD_PROPERTY_VALUE='Active' and not exists ( select '1' from psp_company_law compLaw join psp_law l on compLaw.LAW_FK=L.LAW_ID where compLaw.COMPANY_AGENCY_FK=CA.COMPANY_AGENCY_SEQ and L.PAYMENT_TEMPLATE_FK=CAPT.PAYMENT_TEMPLATE_FK and compLaw.FILING_STATUS='Active' ) ) ) order by c.source_company_id, ca.agency_fk, capt.payment_template_fk, PA.OLD_PROPERTY_VALUE, PA.NEW_PROPERTY_VALUE, PA.AUDIT_DATE) result WHERE RN=1

select * from ( select /*+leading(pa)*/ PA.AUDIT_DATE, C.SOURCE_COMPANY_ID, C.FED_TAX_ID_ENC, C.LEGAL_NAME, CAPT.PAYMENT_TEMPLATE_FK, CA.AGENCY_FK, CAPT.AGENCY_TAXPAYER_ID_ENC, PA.OLD_PROPERTY_VALUE, PA.NEW_PROPERTY_VALUE, row_number() over ( partition by c.source_company_id, ca.agency_fk, capt.payment_template_fk ORDER BY PA.AUDIT_DATE DESC ) rn from psp_company c join psp_company_service cs on CS.COMPANY_FK=C.COMPANY_SEQ join psp_property_audit pa on C.COMPANY_SEQ=PA.COMPANY_FK -- to get the payment template and agency tax payer id join psp_company_agency ca on CA.COMPANY_FK=C.COMPANY_SEQ join psp_companyagency_pmttemplate capt on CAPT.COMPANY_AGENCY_FK=CA.COMPANY_AGENCY_SEQ join psp_company_law cl on CL.COMPANY_LAW_SEQ=PA.OBJECT_IDENTIFIER and CL.COMPANY_AGENCY_FK = ca.company_agency_seq where PA.CLASS_NAME='CompanyLaw' and PA.PROPERTY_NAME='FilingStatus' -- Company is Active and CS.SERVICE_FK='Tax' and CS.STATUS_CD='ActiveCurrent' and CL.ADDITIONAL_COMPANY_LAW_FK is null -- Data for the current month and PA.AUDIT_DATE >= :firstDayOfMonth and PA.AUDIT_DATE <= :lastDayOfMonth -- excluding NOCALC agency and federal (IRS) agency and CA.AGENCY_FK not in ('NOCALC', 'IRS','FLDOR') -- Condition for checking DGDeleted companies and (CASE WHEN (:excludeDeletedCompany = TRUE) THEN c.IS_DG_DISASSOCIATED ELSE 0 END) = 0 -- Condition to get payment templates that are inactive (all means companylaws are inactive for that payment template in CompanyLaw table) and ( PA.OLD_PROPERTY_VALUE='Inactive' or ( PA.OLD_PROPERTY_VALUE='Active' and not exists ( select '1' from psp_company_law compLaw join psp_law l on compLaw.LAW_FK=L.LAW_ID where compLaw.COMPANY_AGENCY_FK=CA.COMPANY_AGENCY_SEQ and L.PAYMENT_TEMPLATE_FK=CAPT.PAYMENT_TEMPLATE_FK and compLaw.FILING_STATUS='Active' ) ) ) order by c.source_company_id, ca.agency_fk, capt.payment_template_fk, PA.OLD_PROPERTY_VALUE, PA.NEW_PROPERTY_VALUE, PA.AUDIT_DATE) result WHERE RN=1
